scripts.build:cloudflare: rm -rf dist && npx vite build --mode cloudflare
scripts.build:itch: rm -rf dist-itch && npx vite build --mode itch
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build:cloudflare && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.publish:itch: npm run build:itch && butler push dist-itch avoidthekitchen/quant-feudalism:html5
